text.title: MCP Server Manifest Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the MCP server manifest the methodology produces — server identity, tool list, transport, auth, registration block.

example.note: Upper-case server_name (pattern fail), non-semver version, deprecated `sse` transport, no health probe, vague tool name, polymorphic schema, missing `registration` block, remote-style transport implied but `auth.mode=none`.

list.item: Server name kebab/snake-cased and unique within target client config.
At least one tool is `ping` or `health` with empty inputSchema.
Every tool description ≥16 chars and action-oriented ("Get…", "Run…", "List…").
Registration block is paste-ready for Claude Code `settings.json`.
